title: Sealing system for an oven cavity
abstract: The present invention relates to a sealing system for an oven cavity (10) of an oven, in particular of a cooking oven. The sealing system includes an outer steam-tight gasket (20) attachable or attached at a front frame (26), which encloses a cavity frame (12) of the oven cavity, which in turn encloses a front opening of said oven cavity (10). The sealing system includes an inner heat resistant gasket (18) attachable or attached at the cavity frame (12) and/or at the front frame (26), so that the inner heat resistant gasket (18) is aligned at least partially at the cavity frame (12) and at an inner panel (16) of an oven door (14) for closing the oven cavity (10) in a closed state of said oven door (14). The sealing system includes a gap sealing (19) arrangeable or arranged within a gap between the cavity frame (12) and the front frame (26), so that the gap sealing (19) encloses completely or partially the cavity frame (12). The inner heat resistant gasket (18) and the outer steam-tight gasket (20) are attachable or attached in such a way, that said inner heat resistant gasket (18) and outer steam-tight gasket (20) are aligned at the inner panel (16) of the oven door (14) at least in the closed state of said oven door (14).
claims:
Claims Claims 1. A sealing system for an oven cavity (10) of an oven, in par ticular of a cooking oven, wherein: the sealing system includes an outer steam-tight gasket (20) attachable or attached at a front frame (26), which encloses a cavity frame (12) of the oven cavity, which in turn encloses a front opening of said oven cavity (10), the sealing system includes an inner heat resistant gasket (18) attachable or attached at the cavity frame (12) and/or at the front frame (26), so that the inner heat resistant gasket (18) is aligned at least par tially at the cavity frame (12) and at an inner panel (16) of an oven door (14) for closing the oven cavity (10) in a closed state of said oven door (14), the sealing system includes a gap sealing (19) arrange- able or arranged within a gap between the cavity frame (12) and the front frame (26), so that the gap sealing (19) encloses completely or partially the cavity frame ( 12 ) , and the inner heat resistant gasket (18) and the outer steam-tight gasket (20) are attachable or attached in such a way, that said inner heat resistant gasket (18) and outer steam-tight gasket (20) are aligned at the inner panel (16) of the oven door (14) at least in the closed state of said oven door (14) . 2. The sealing system according to claim 1, characterised in that the inner heat resistant gasket (18) and the outer steam- tight gasket (20) are formed as separate gaskets (18, 20), wherein preferably said inner heat resistant gasket (18) and 

 outer steam-tight gasket (20) are arrangeable or arranged at a distance from each other. 3. The sealing system according to claim 1 or 2, characterised in that the outer steam-tight gasket (20) is made of silicone, graphite, ceramic material or the like. 4. The sealing system according to any one of the preceding claims , characterised in that the inner heat resistant gasket (18) is made of fibreglass or any other material heat resistant up to 500Â°C. 5. The sealing system according to any one of the preceding claims , characterised in that the inner heat resistant gasket (18) is clampable between the cavity frame (12) and the front frame (26) enclosing said cavity frame (12) . 6. The sealing system according to any one of the preceding claims , characterised in that the outer steam-tight gasket (20) has an elongated cross- section, wherein the longitudinal axis of said elongated cross-section extends perpendicular to the plane of the in ner glass panel (16) in the mounted state of the outer steam-tight gasket (20) and in the closed state of the oven door ( 14 ) . 7. The sealing system according to any one of the preceding claims , characterised in that 

 the inner heat resistant gasket (18) is attachable or at tached at the inner panel (16) of the oven door (14), wherein at least one contact line (24) is formed between said inner heat resistant gasket (18) and the cavity frame (10) in the closed state of the oven door (14) . 8. The sealing system according to any one of the claims 1 to 5, characterised in that the inner heat resistant gasket (18) is attachable or at tached at the cavity frame (12) and/or the front frame (26), wherein at least one contact line (24) is formed between said inner heat resistant gasket (18) and the inner panel (16) of the oven door (14) in the closed state of the oven door ( 14 ) . 9. The sealing system according to claim 6 or 7, characterised in that the inner heat resistant gasket (18) is attachable or at tached at the inner panel (16) of the oven door (14) or at the cavity frame (12), respectively, by clips, bolts, screws or the like. 10. The sealing system according to any one of the preceding claims , characterised in that the outer steam-tight gasket (20) is attached or attachable at the front frame (26) enclosing the cavity frame (12) of the oven cavity (10) . 11. The sealing system according to any one of the preceding claims , characterised in that 

 the outer steam-tight gasket (20) is coated by a heat re sistant layer. 12. An oven, in particular a cooking oven, comprising at least one sealing system according to any one of the claims 1 to 11, wherein: the oven comprises at least one oven cavity (10), the oven cavity (10) includes a cavity frame (12) en closing a front opening of said oven cavity (10), the oven cavity (10) includes a front frame (16) en closing the cavity frame (12) of said oven cavity (10), the front sides of the cavity frame (12) and the front frame (16) extend within one plane, the oven comprises at least one oven door (14) for closing the front opening of said oven cavity (10), and at least that portion of the inner side of the oven door (14) arranged in front of the cavity frame (12) and front frame (16) in the closed state of the oven door (14) extends within one plane. 13. The oven according to claim 12, characterised in that the inner side of the oven door (14) extends within one sin gle plane. 14. The oven according to claim 12 or 13, characterised in that the cavity frame (12) and the front frame (16) are thermally isolated from each other.
